---
title: "Déprescription"
---


### PIMCheck {#pimcheck .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.pimcheck.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/pimcheck.png" alt="PIMCheck">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.pimcheck.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">PIMCheck</a>
<div class="outil-source">
À compléter
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```


### Deprescribing {#deprescribing .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://deprescribing.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/deprescribing.png" alt="Deprescribing">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://deprescribing.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Deprescribing.org</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Bruyère Research Institute
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```


### Réseau canadien de déprescription {#resea .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://reseaudeprescription.ca/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/reseaudeprescription.png" alt="Réseau déprescription">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://reseaudeprescription.ca/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Réseau canadien de déprescription</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Réseau canadien de déprescription
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### MedStopper {#medstopper .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://medstopper.com/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/medstopper.png" alt="MedStopper">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://medstopper.com/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Medstopper</a>
<div class="outil-source">
University of British Columbia
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### Association Professionnelle des Pharmaciens Salariés du Québec {#appsq .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://appsq.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/appsq.png" alt="APPSQ">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://appsq.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">APPSQ</a>
<div class="outil-source">
-
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### Primary Health Tasmania {#pht .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://primaryhealthtas.com.au/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/pht.png" alt="PHT">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://primaryhealthtas.com.au/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Primary Health Tasmania</a>
<div class="outil-source">
-
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
